display.purpose: Screen titles and wordmark only; soft optical serif, deliberately modest for an app.

headline.purpose: Section and card headers; agenda day heading.

title.purpose: List-item titles, Hijo names, Pauta names.

label.purpose: Metadata, captions, pill text, field labels.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets, popovers, FAB. Soft, low, warm-tinted, never harsh.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions; exponential ease-out, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #5c794f; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font: 600 1rem/1 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4d6742; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5c794f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet tonal button for secondary actions; calmer than an outline ghost.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #efe7d8; color: #2a261f; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font: 600 1rem/1 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e6dccb; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5c794f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Comfortable single-line field; 48px min height for one-handed tapping.
components.css: .ds-input { min-height: 48px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 12px 14px; background: #ece6da; color: #2a261f; border: 1px solid #e3d9c7; border-radius: 12px; font: 400 1rem/1.4 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6d645a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #5c794f; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(92,121,79,0.32); }

components.name: Screen Title
components.description: Screen title in Fraunces (the soft optical serif); the only display-serif use besides the wordmark.
components.css: .ds-title { margin: 0; font: 500 2rem/1.1 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #2a261f; }

components.name: Status Pill (done)
components.description: Domain-state pill; always pairs color with an icon or word, never color alone.
components.html: Comprado
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-pill-done { background: #e2ead9; color: #38502d; }

components.name: Status Pill (due)
components.description: Approaching Administración or Evento; clock icon plus label. Uses the clay attention hue as a tint.
components.html: En 2 h
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-pill-due { background: #f3e2d3; color: #8a4521; }

components.name: List Item
components.description: Signature row for shopping list / agenda / pautas; tappable, flat at rest, ≥44px.
components.html: Ibuprofeno 100mg/5mlCada 8 h · próxima 18:30 · Leo
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 56px; padding: 10px 14px; background: #fffaf3; border-bottom: 1px solid #e3d9c7; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-row:hover { background: #f6efe4; } .ds-row-check { width: 22px; height: 22px; flex: none; border: 2px solid #c8bca8; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-row-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-row-title { font: 600 1.0625rem/1.3 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #2a261f; } .ds-row-meta { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #6d645a; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-row-chev { color: #c8bca8; flex: none; }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar
components.description: Thumb-reachable primary navigation across the core surfaces.
components.html: InicioCompraSalud
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; background: #fffaf3; border-top: 1px solid #e3d9c7; padding: 6px 4px; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; padding: 6px 0; min-height: 48px; color: #6d645a; text-decoration: none; font: 500 0.6875rem/1 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tab-active { color: #5c794f; } .ds-tab span { letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

narrative.northStar: The Shared Ledger on the Fridge Door
narrative.overview: Tándem is the calm, trustworthy place where a Familia keeps the facts that would otherwise live in someone's overloaded head. The interface behaves like a well-kept note on the fridge — instantly readable at a glance, honest, never demanding. The system is built on restraint and warmth: a warm greige field, cream-white cards, a single grounded sage for the brand and for what genuinely needs attention, and a clay hue reserved for 'needs you now'. Fraunces (soft optical serif) carries the titles and wordmark; Hanken Grotesk keeps the working UI plain and legible. It is adult and plain-spoken, about children but used by adults. The read path is optimized before the write path.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutrals carry the bulk; one grounded sage, spent sparingly, marks what matters; clay is reserved for 'needs you now'.
Fraunces (serif display) + Hanken Grotesk (humanist sans) — warmth from the title voice, legibility from the body voice.
Glanceable first: state is legible in ~3 seconds, one-handed, in sun or a dark room.
Adult and plain, never cute, never corporate.
Flat and quiet at rest; depth and motion only when something is genuinely transient.
Light and dark are equal first-class citizens.

rules.name: The Quiet Sage Rule
rules.body: The primary sage covers ≤10% of any screen. Surfaces stay warm-neutral. If everything is colored, nothing reads as urgent — and urgency is the only thing color is allowed to signal.

rules.name: The State-Is-Never-Color-Alone Rule
rules.body: pending/comprado, activa/finalizada, due/overdue must always pair their color with an icon, label, or shape. Color is reinforcement, never the sole carrier.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Fraunces for screen titles and the wordmark; Hanken Grotesk for the entire working UI. Never reach for the serif in a button, label, or data cell — and never introduce a third family.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every domain figure — height in cm, weight in kg, Talla label, dose, interval, date, time — renders with tabular-nums so columns align and numbers never jitter as they update.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: A resting surface has no shadow — only a tonal step or a 1px border. Shadows appear only on summoned or moving layers (sheets, menus, FAB, drag).

dos: Do keep the primary sage to ≤10% of any screen; let warm-neutral surfaces carry the bulk. Reserve clay strictly for 'needs you now'.
Do pair every state with an icon or word, never color alone.
Do use tabular-nums for every Medida, Talla, dose, interval, date, and time.
Do keep body text on ink (~12:1+), reserve muted for genuine secondary text only; prefer muted on surface over bg.
Do make every tap target ≥44px and reachable one-handed; primary actions live in thumb range.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; reserve shadow for sheets, FAB, and toasts.
Do treat dark mode as a first-class design, verified at AA, not an inverted afterthought.
Do use the ubiquitous language in the UI (Familia, Hijo, Medida, Talla, Ítem de compra, Evento, Visita médica, Pauta, Administración).
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no navy/gray enterprise palette, no wall of hero-metric / KPI tiles.
Don't go childish or cutesy: no baby pastels, no cartoon mascots, no rounded-everything, no playful illustrations.
Don't make a cluttered productivity app: surface what matters now and let the rest recede.
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left > 1px) as a card/list accent.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't over-round: cards top out at 20px, controls at 12px; full pills are for small chips and avatars only.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide soft drop shadow on the same element.
Don't gate content visibility on a reveal animation, and always honor prefers-reduced-motion.
